results.title: Hamburg agree deal to sign Vieira replacement
results.description: Hamburger SV have agreed a deal to sign French midfielder Martin Adeline from ESTAC Troyes for €4 million plus bonuses, according to Bild.L’Équipe and Hamburger Abendblatt are also reporting on H...

results.title: Belgium World Cup stars rally around Senne Lammens after heartbreaking loss
results.description: Belgium was eliminated from the World Cup in the quarterfinals by Spain after goalkeeper Senne Lammens conceded a late goal to Mikel Merino in the 88th minute, sparking an outpouring of support.

results.title: ‘Hometown boy’: Copper City Chiefs draft Rome native Rutkowski for inaugural season
results.description: The city’s new semi-professional hockey team is seeking leadership and experience from veteran defenseman and Rome native Jaxon Rutkowski to lead the team when it begins play this year.
